title: EnhancementProposal
description: A single Phase 2 enrichment proposal emitted by /forge:enhance. Each record carries an op classification (insert/update/delete a skill artifact), the target file path, and a diff body. Foundation for the T03 judge, T05 delete detection, T06 compression gate, and T07 queue drain.

op.description: Three-op classification: insert a new skill artifact, update an existing one, or delete an existing one.

target_path.description: Repository-relative path to the artifact being inserted, updated, or deleted (e.g. forge/skills/engineer-skills.md).

diff_body.description: Unified-diff body or full file body for inserts. For delete_skill this may be empty — the op + target_path is sufficient.

recurrence_count.description: FORGE-S24-T04 — count of distinct tasks within the same sprint that emitted a matching (subkind, evidence.skillId) friction event, including the originating task. Always >= 1.

recurrence_task_ids.description: FORGE-S24-T04 — taskOrder-sorted list of task IDs that contributed to recurrence_count. Empty when the originating friction event cannot be resolved from sourceFrictionIds.
